title: DCS map projection parameters
description: Maps a DCS theatre name (env.mission.theatre) to its Transverse Mercator parameters. Only lon_0/x_0/y_0 vary; the rest of the model is fixed in code (proj=tmerc, lat_0=0, k_0=0.9996, ellps=WGS84, axis=neu).

lon_0.description: Central meridian, degrees (always an integer for DCS maps).
